---
title: "PCA_cleaned"
author: "Raymond Otoo"
date: "2026-01-23"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r}
library(openxlsx)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(pheatmap)
```

#=====================================================================================
#
# 00- Set working directory
#=====================================================================================
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source("project_setup.R")
paths <- init_project(knitr_root = TRUE)
getwd()
```

```{r}
# Protein expression (already z-scored)
ProtoData <- read.xlsx(
  file.path(paths$data_dir, "all_ADRC_ADNI_proteomics_samples_Zscore_soma_only.xlsx")
)
 
# Phenotype data
PhenoInfo <- read.xlsx(
  file.path(paths$data_dir, "all_ADRC_ADNI_csfprot_wmhpheno_CLEAN_FINAL_10_24_2025.xlsx")
)
```


```{r}
wmh_vars <- PhenoInfo[, c(
  "wmh_juxta",
  "wmh_frontal",
  "wmh_pv",
  "wmh_parietal",
  "wmh_posterior"
)]
 
wmh_scaled <- scale(wmh_vars)
```

```{r}
pca_res <- prcomp(wmh_scaled, center = TRUE, scale. = TRUE)
 
# Variance explained
summary(pca_res)
```
```{r}
pca_res$x
```

#save  PC1–PC3 scores to file 
```{r}
# Extract PC1–PC3 scores
pca_scores_1_3 <- as.data.frame(pca_res$x[, 1:3])
 
# Add sample names from original phenotype file
pca_scores_1_3$SampleID <- PhenoInfo$ID
 
# Reorder columns
pca_scores_1_3 <- pca_scores_1_3 %>%
  dplyr::select(SampleID, PC1, PC2, PC3)
 
# Save to file
write.csv(
  pca_scores_1_3,
  file = file.path(paths$pca_dir, "WMH_PCA_scores_PC1_PC3.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
dim(PhenoInfo)
```


```{r}
loadings_raw <- as.data.frame(pca_res$rotation)
loadings_raw$Trait <- rownames(loadings_raw)
```


```{r}
pca_scores <- as.data.frame(pca_res$x)
```

```{r}
arrow_scale <- 3
loadings_plot <- loadings_raw
loadings_plot[, c("PC1", "PC2")] <- loadings_plot[, c("PC1", "PC2")] * arrow_scale
 
png(file.path(paths$pca_dir, "pca_wmh_biplot.png"), width = 1600, height = 1600, res = 200)
 
ggplot(pca_scores, aes(PC1, PC2)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_segment(
    data = loadings_plot,
    aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend = PC1, yend = PC2),
    arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.3, "cm")),
    color = "red"
  ) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = loadings_plot,
    aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, label = Trait),
    color = "red",
    size = 4
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "PCA of WMH Traits",
    x = paste0("PC1 (", round(summary(pca_res)$importance[2,1] * 100, 1), "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", round(summary(pca_res)$importance[2,2] * 100, 1), "%)")
  )
 
dev.off()
```


```{r}
# Prepare loadings for PCs 1–3
loadings_long <- loadings_raw %>%
  dplyr::select(Trait, PC1, PC2, PC3) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("PC"),
    names_to = "PC",
    values_to = "Loading"
  )
 
png(file.path(paths$pca_dir, "wmh_pca_loadings_barplot.png"), width = 2000, height = 1000, res = 200)
 
ggplot(loadings_long, aes(x = Trait, y = Loading, fill = PC)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "WMH PCA Loadings (PC1–PC3)",
    x = "WMH Region",
    y = "PCA Loading"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
 
dev.off()
```


```{r}
loading_mat <- loadings_raw[, c("PC1", "PC2", "PC3")]
rownames(loading_mat) <- loadings_raw$Trait
 
# Optional ordering (helps interpretation)
loading_mat <- loading_mat[c(
  "wmh_pv",
  "wmh_juxta",
  "wmh_frontal",
  "wmh_parietal",
  "wmh_posterior"
), ]
 
png(file.path(paths$pca_dir, "wmh_pca_loadings_heatmap.png"), width = 1200, height = 800, res = 200)
 
pheatmap(
  loading_mat,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE,
  display_numbers = TRUE,
  number_format = "%.2f",
  color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100),
  main = "PCA Loadings of WMH Traits (PC1–PC3)"
)
 
dev.off()
```


```{r}
range(loadings_raw[, c("PC1", "PC2", "PC3")])
```


#=====================================================================================
#
# 00-  PCA Biplot: PC2 vs PC3
#=====================================================================================
```{r}
# =========================
# PCA Biplot: PC2 vs PC3
# =========================
 
arrow_scale_23 <- 3
loadings_plot_23 <- loadings_raw
loadings_plot_23[, c("PC2", "PC3")] <- loadings_plot_23[, c("PC2", "PC3")] * arrow_scale_23
 
png(file.path(paths$pca_dir, "pca_wmh_biplot_PC2_PC3.png"), width = 1600, height = 1600, res = 200)
 
ggplot(pca_scores, aes(PC2, PC3)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_segment(
    data = loadings_plot_23,
    aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend = PC2, yend = PC3),
    arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.3, "cm")),
    color = "red"
  ) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = loadings_plot_23,
    aes(x = PC2, y = PC3, label = Trait),
    color = "red",
    size = 4
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "PCA of WMH Traits (PC2 vs PC3)",
    x = paste0("PC2 (", round(summary(pca_res)$importance[2,2] * 100, 1), "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC3 (", round(summary(pca_res)$importance[2,3] * 100, 1), "%)")
  )
 
dev.off()
```


```{r}
# =========================
# Flip PC1 loadings for interpretation
# =========================
 
loadings_flipped <- loadings_raw
loadings_flipped$PC1 <- -loadings_flipped$PC1
```


#=====================================================================================
#
# 00- PCA loadings barplot PC1 flipped
#=====================================================================================

```{r}
loadings_long_flipped <- loadings_flipped %>%
  dplyr::select(Trait, PC1, PC2, PC3) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("PC"),
    names_to = "PC",
    values_to = "Loading"
  )
 
png(file.path(paths$pca_dir, "wmh_pca_loadings_barplot_PC1_flipped.png"), width = 2000, height = 1000, res = 200)
 
ggplot(loadings_long_flipped, aes(x = Trait, y = Loading, fill = PC)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "WMH PCA Loadings (PC1 Flipped)",
    x = "WMH Region",
    y = "PCA Loading"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
 
dev.off()
```


#=====================================================================================
#
# 00- PCA loadings heatmap PC1 flipped
#=====================================================================================
```{r}
loading_mat_flipped <- loadings_flipped[, c("PC1", "PC2", "PC3")]
rownames(loading_mat_flipped) <- loadings_flipped$Trait
 
loading_mat_flipped <- loading_mat_flipped[c(
  "wmh_pv",
  "wmh_juxta",
  "wmh_frontal",
  "wmh_parietal",
  "wmh_posterior"
), ]
 
png(file.path(paths$pca_dir, "wmh_pca_loadings_heatmap_PC1_flipped.png"), width = 1200, height = 800, res = 200)
 
pheatmap(
  loading_mat_flipped,
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE,
  display_numbers = TRUE,
  number_format = "%.2f",
  color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100),
  main = "PCA Loadings of WMH Traits (PC1 Flipped)"
)
 
dev.off()
```
